title: Fork of 7 Hämis
description:
Large kitchen sink pack made for the Hämiscraft server!
Full of combat, exploration, dungeons, magic, and a bit of tech.
body:
A Fork of AoF 7 turned Hämis. Lot's of Hämis, made of Hämis, for Hämis. Hämis!

Mostly new Additions, including ice and fire, the rpg-series, Hex Casting, and more leisure time mods as well as an expansion on magic mods for a greater reportoire of options.

Made for fitting the wishes of a group of crafty Hämis by tweaking the modlist a little (refer to the changelog for complete list of mod changes from AoF 7), adding new Recipes (WiP) and quests for the added mods (WiP)

Many mods focus on exploration, boss hunting, and grinding for plenty of valuables.
Tech includes Modern Idustrialization, Create, and a bit of magical machinery as well.
This pack also contains a large arsenal that you get to forge, enchant, and conquer with!

Offers a few more things than AoF 7 and (almost) everything that it already had for a little bit different of an experience
